description: Codex Desktop operating evidence for the beginner path.

screenshots.alt: Codex Desktop 安装后选择 Codex 工作面的界面示意
screenshots.caption: 图意：登录后先进入 Codex 工作面，而不是在通用 Chat 里直接发仓库任务。
screenshots.redaction_notes: Generic workspace/repo placeholders; no usernames, tokens, or local paths.

screenshots.alt: Codex Desktop 选择本地 example-repo 并设置 Ask for approval 的界面示意
screenshots.caption: 图意：选定仓库后确认权限模式；首次任务建议 Ask for approval。
screenshots.redaction_notes: Generic workspace/repo placeholders; no usernames, tokens, or local paths.

pages: install-desktop.html#看到权限请求时怎么判断
screenshots.alt: Codex Desktop 展示 Run command 审批请求与批准拒绝按钮的界面示意
screenshots.caption: 图意：批准前核对命令用途、绑定地址和停止方式；不需要的动作直接拒绝。
screenshots.redaction_notes: Generic workspace/repo placeholders; no usernames, tokens, or local paths.

screenshots.alt: Codex Desktop 展示 README 改动 diff 与 make check 验证结果的界面示意
screenshots.caption: 图意：先看 diff，再对照验证命令输出；不要只看自然语言摘要。
screenshots.redaction_notes: Generic workspace/repo placeholders; no usernames, tokens, or local paths.

pages: desktop-cli.html#3.-用浏览器反馈定位问题
screenshots.alt: Codex Desktop Browser 在 GitHub Pages 页面上留下视觉反馈标记的界面示意
screenshots.caption: 图意：Browser 反馈应附带 URL 和预期结果，便于 Codex 定位要改的区域。
screenshots.redaction_notes: Generic workspace/repo placeholders; no usernames, tokens, or local paths.
